---
title: "Resume"
date: "5-8-2024"

about:
  template: trestles
  image: Headshot1.png
  image-width: 350px
  image-shape: rounded
  links: 
    - icon: save
      text: Download
      href: Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf

format:
  html: 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---
